series_metadata.series_title: The Public Children Service Agencies (PCSA) Staff Exit Survey System
series_metadata.series_description: The Public Children Service Agencies (PCSA) Staff Exit Survey System is owned by Ohio Department of Job and Family Services (ODJFS), Office of Families and Children (OFC), used for Public Children Service Agencies' (PCSA) employees who have separated from the PCSA. This electronic record consists of but not limited to: Employee's Name, PCSA, Dates of employment, Resigned or Terminated, Reason for separation, Employee's OHID, Recruitment and Retention Strategies, Supervisor's Name and work e-mail address.
